terms.title: Store Terms & Conditions
terms.footerNote: This policy is written in the masculine form for convenience only and applies to all genders. For legal or business questions, contact us at
terms.s1.title: General
terms.s1.body: Welcome to Aluf Computers (the "Site"). Use of the site and purchase of products are subject to the terms detailed below. Reading and agreeing to these terms is a condition of using the site. If you do not agree to any term, please stop using the site.
terms.s2.title: Orders & Purchases
terms.s2.body: Purchasing on the site is permitted for persons aged 18 and over only. The site reserves the right to cancel an order in the event of a proven error in the product price, out-of-stock situation, or any other reasonable cause. In such a case the charge will be fully refunded and the customer will have no further claim. Prices shown on the site include VAT (18%) unless otherwise stated. Images shown are for illustration purposes only.
terms.s3.title: Shipping
terms.s3.body: Free shipping on orders over ₪500 to the central region. Delivery time: 2–4 business days from order confirmation. Aluf Computers is not responsible for delays caused by the courier. For store pickup: available at Herzl 102, Rishon LeZion within one business day.
terms.s4.title: Cancellations & Returns
terms.s4.body: Orders may be cancelled within 14 days of receiving the product in accordance with the Consumer Protection Law. The product must be in its original packaging, undamaged and unused. A cancellation fee of up to 5% of the transaction price may be charged per law. For inquiries contact sales@aluf.co.il or 053-336-8084.
terms.s5.title: Warranty
terms.s5.body: All products come with an official 3-year importer warranty at the customer's home, unless otherwise stated. The warranty does not cover physical damage, liquid damage, misuse, or opening by an unauthorized technician. Aluf Computers is not liable for any indirect damages.
terms.s6.title: Intellectual Property
terms.s6.body: All content on the site including texts, images, logos and designs are the exclusive property of Aluf Computers and are protected by copyright. Copying, reproducing, distributing or any commercial use is prohibited without explicit written permission.
terms.s7.title: Data Retention
terms.s7.body: Aluf Computers collects personal information solely for processing orders and improving service. The information is not sold to third parties. See our Privacy Policy for further details.
terms.s8.title: Changes to Terms
terms.s8.body: Aluf Computers reserves the right to change these terms at any time. Changes will be published on the site and take effect immediately upon publication. Continued use of the site after a change constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s9.title: Contact Us
terms.s9.body:
For questions and inquiries:
📍 Herzl 102, Rishon LeZion
📞 053-336-8084
✉️ sales@aluf.co.il
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Aluf Computers we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and what your rights are.
privacy.footerNote: This policy complies with the Privacy Protection Law 5741-1981 and Privacy Protection Regulations (Data Security) 5777-2017. For legal questions contact
privacy.s1.title: What Information Do We Collect?
privacy.s1.body:
We collect information you voluntarily provide when making a purchase or contacting customer service:
• Full name
• Phone number and email
• Shipping address
• Payment details (processed directly by the secure payment system – we have no access to credit card details)

We may also collect technical information: IP address, browser type, pages viewed and visit duration – for site improvement purposes only.
privacy.s2.title: How Do We Use the Information?
privacy.s2.body:
The information is collected for:
• Processing orders and coordinating deliveries
• Customer service and responding to inquiries
• Sending order updates (SMS / email)
• Improving your browsing experience
• Sending newsletters and promotions – only with your explicit consent

Your information will not be used for any other purpose without your consent.
privacy.s3.title: Data Security
privacy.s3.body:
The site is secured with SSL/TLS. Payments are processed by a PCI-DSS certified payment system. Credit card details are not stored on our servers.

We take appropriate security measures to prevent unauthorized access; however, no security is absolute on the internet.
privacy.s4.title: Cookies
privacy.s4.body:
The site uses cookies for:
• Saving cart items
• Remembering language and display preferences
• Traffic analysis (Google Analytics – anonymous data only)

You can manage or delete cookies in your browser settings. Deleting them may affect certain functionality.
privacy.s5.title: Sharing with Third Parties
privacy.s5.body:
We do not sell, trade or transfer your personal information to third parties, except:
• Delivery services – solely to fulfill the order
• Payment processor – solely to process payments
• Cloud providers – to maintain servers under confidentiality terms

In the event of a legal requirement, we will share information with the competent authorities only.
privacy.s6.title: Your Rights
privacy.s6.body:
Under the Privacy Protection Law (Israel), you have the right:
• To request to view the information stored about you
• To request correction of incorrect information
• To request deletion of your information
• To withdraw consent to receive marketing materials at any time

To exercise these rights contact sales@aluf.co.il
privacy.s7.title: Changes to This Policy
privacy.s7.body: Aluf Computers reserves the right to update this policy. Material changes will be published on the site and take effect 7 days after publication. The date of the last update appears at the top of the page.
privacy.s8.title: Contact Us
